title: Hyper Realistic Studio Portrait Stunning Young Woman
sourceTitle: Hyper Realistic Studio Portrait Stunning Young Woman
prompt:
A hyper-realistic studio portrait of a stunning young woman with hazel eyes and dark brown hair styled in a messy high bun with soft loose strands framing her face. She is wearing a cream-colored zip-up cardigan featuring delicate embroidered floral and cat-themed patches. She is cradling a fluffy, long-haired tabby and white Maine Coon mix cat with striking green eyes.
Composition & Lighting: Medium shot, centered composition. Soft, cinematic Rembrandt lighting with gentle highlights on the skin and fur. Professional bokeh effect.
Background & Palette: Deep slate blue textured studio backdrop with subtle vignettes. Palette consists of cream, earthy browns, soft pinks, and muted blues.
